raw_consumer_statement:
I entered into a contractual agreement with XXXX and XXXX XXXX 's other business XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX to manage my XXXX XXXX The funds would be professionally managed in XXXX  exchange ( XXXX  ) trading, a marketplace investment program. Below are the charges which we never received any service. Citi continues to resolve the complaint in the favor of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I started this the complaint with Citi as a Fraud complaint in XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX XX/XX/XXXX I was notified that it could not be filed as a Fraud complaint and I would have to re-open all of the charges as billing disputes. Due to they were dragging their feet and not providing a resolution, I continued to get delaying emails. After weeks and weeks of delay and missed calls, on XX/XX/XXXX I learned that there was only 1 of the 8 charges that a billing dispute had been opened... not the 8 that was requested. Again, more delay tactics over the next weeks. On XX/XX/XXXX I was able to speak to someone and and demanded an executive office review. On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX from Citi Executive Response team advised that all charges were not ruled in my favor due to it took longer than 60 days for his team to receive the complaint. His area may not have received it, but it was requested to be opened well within 60 days. 

Charges : XX/XX/XXXX {$4000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$4000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$4000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$2000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$14000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$8000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$4000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$2000.00} XXXX XXXX, and his family, are being investigated by the FBI for the theft of funds and services for over XXXX XXXX XXXX  across at least 7 states. I have attempted contact with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX times and could not make contact. 

Thank you, XXXX XXXX
